---
title: Intro
author: mkeutgen
date: '2021-12-21'
slug: intro
categories: []
tags:
  - goals
  - statistics
  - earth science
---

Hello everyone. This is an introductory post to my blog or at least what is supposed to become one at one point. As of December 2022, I am a student in statistics at KU Leuven and I studied geology before that. I am very interested in climate science, statistics and the environment. 

This blog initial purpose is to be useful for me and maybe for some other people. I want it to be an open diary where I collect and share relevant informations for my topics of interest. As human memory is fallible, I make of this website my external memory.

Yours,

Maxime
